violations.text: Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Handsink cleared during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
The (bar) hand-washing sink is lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2026
The floor in the (bar) 3-bay sink area is in poor repair. Hole observed. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026
